scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test
scripts.db:types:check: supabase gen types typescript --local > /tmp/db.ts && diff -q /tmp/db.ts types/database.ts

comments.verify: The gate every slice must pass before it's 'done'.
comments.db:sync: Rebuild local from all migrations + regenerate types. Run after pulling new migrations.
comments.db:pull: Bring prod schema DOWN into a migration (adopt/rescue or fix drift). Then db:reset.
comments.db:push: Push local migrations UP to prod. Normally runs in CI on merge to main, not locally.
comments.db:status: Show which migrations are applied locally vs remotely — your drift check.
comments._dependencies_note: Scaffolded with Next 16 (App Router) + Tailwind v3 + Vitest + Playwright. Supabase CLI installed separately.
